---
title: "1.0-exploratory-data-analysis"
author: "Julia M.C."
date: "2026-04-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# Loading the libraries and datasets
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
setwd("~/Downloads/DATASETS")
crime <- read_csv("crime_cleaned.csv")
dispatch <- read_csv("dispatch_cleaned.csv")
bias <- read_csv("bias_cleaned.csv")
citation <- read_csv("citation_cleaned.csv")
```

```{r}
combined_data <- dispatch |>
  left_join(crime, by = c("crime_reports" = "cr_number")) |>
  # This step fixes the "Column not found" error by picking the dispatch columns
  rename(
    police_district_number = police_district_number.x,
    year_month = year_month.x) |>
  mutate(
    no_crime_report = if_else(is.na(crime_name1), 
                             "No Crime Report Generated", "Crime Confirmed"),
    
    # Clean strings for better matching
    initial_type_clean = str_to_upper(str_trim(initial_type)),
    crime_name1_clean = str_to_upper(str_trim(crime_name1)),
    
    mismatch = case_when(
      no_crime_report == "No Crime Report Generated" ~ "N/A",
      initial_type_clean == crime_name1_clean ~ "Match",
      TRUE ~ "Mismatch"
    ))
```


# Severity Logic 
```{r}
unique(dispatch$initial_type)
unique(crime$crime_name1)
unique(crime$crime_name2)
```

```{r}
combined_data <- combined_data |>
  mutate(
    initial_norm = initial_type_clean |>
      str_to_upper() |>
      str_replace_all("[^A-Z ]", " ") |>
      str_squish()
  )

combined_data <- combined_data |>
  mutate(
    initial_rank = case_when(
      str_detect(initial_norm,
        "HOMICIDE|MURDER|SHOOT|SHOOTING|ACTIVE ASSAILANT|
         WEAPON|WEAP|FIREARM|
         ROBBERY|ROBB|ROB|
         ASSAULT|ASLT|
         ARSON|
         KIDNAP|ABDUCT|
         RAPE|SEXUAL|SEXASLT|
         STAB|
         TRAFFICK|
         EXTORT|
         CARJACK|
         DOMESTIC VIOLENCE|DOMV"
      ) ~ 3,

      str_detect(initial_norm,
        "THEFT|LARCENY|BURG|BURGLARY|
         FRAUD|DECEPTION|
         VANDAL|DAMAGE|MISCHIEF|
         STOLEN VEHICLE|AUTO THEFT"
      ) ~ 2,

      str_detect(initial_norm,
        "DISORDERLY|DISTURBANCE|
         SUSPICIOUS|SUSPIC|
         NOISE|
         MENTAL|
         DRUG|CDS|
         DUI|DRIVING UNDER|
         LOITER|
         TRESPASS|
         LIQUOR|
         RUNAWAY|MISSING|
         HARASS|THREAT|
         WELFARE|
         ANIMAL|
         OVERDOSE|
         TRAFFIC|
         ADMIN|ASSIST|FOLLOW UP|INVESTIGATION"
      ) ~ 1,

      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )


combined_data <- combined_data |>
  mutate(
    crime_rank = case_when(
      crime_name2 %in% c(
        "Robbery",
        "Aggravated Assault",
        "Simple Assault",
        "Kidnapping/Abduction",
        "Forcible Rape",
        "Forcible Fondling",
        "Murder and Nonnegligent Manslaughter",
        "Negligent Manslaughter",
        "Justifiable Homicide",
        "Weapon Law Violations",
        "Arson",
        "Human Trafficking, Commercial Sex Acts",
        "Human Trafficking, Involuntary Servitude",
        "Extortion/Blackmail",
        "Animal Cruelty",
        "Statuory Rape",
        "Incest",
        "Intimidation"
      ) ~ 3,

      crime_name2 %in% c(
        "Burglary/Breaking and Entering",
        "Motor Vehicle Theft",
        "Theft From Motor Vehicle",
        "Theft from Building",
        "Theft of Motor Vehicle Parts or Accessories",
        "All other Larceny",
        "Shoplifting",
        "Pocket/picking",
        "From Coin/Operated Machine or Device",
        "Destruction/Damage/Vandalism of Property",
        "Identity Theft",
        "Credit Card/Automatic Teller Machine Fraud",
        "False Pretenses/Swindle/Confidence Game",
        "Wire Fraud",
        "Hacking/Computer Invasion",
        "Embezzlement",
        "Counterfeiting/Forgery",
        "Stolen Property Offenses",
        "Purse-snatching",
        "Impersonation",
        "Welfare Fraud"
      ) ~ 2,

      crime_name2 %in% c(
        "Disorderly Conduct",
        "Driving Under the Influence",
        "Drug/Narcotic Violations",
        "Drug Equipment Violations",
        "Prostitution",
        "Assisting or Promoting Prostitution",
        "Curfew/Loitering/Vagrancy Violations",
        "Liquor Law Violations",
        "Trespass of Real Property",
        "Runaway",
        "All Other Offenses",
        "Family Offenses, NonViolent",
        "Operating/Promoting/Assisting Gambling",
        "Pornography/Obscene Material",
        "Bribery"
      ) ~ 1,

      # fallback
      crime_name1 == "Crime Against Person" ~ 3,
      crime_name1 == "Crime Against Property" ~ 2,
      crime_name1 %in% c("Crime Against Society", "Crime Against Not a Crime") ~ 1,

      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

```{r}
combined_data <- combined_data |>
  mutate(
    severity_shift = case_when(
      no_crime_report == "No Crime Report Generated" ~ "N/A (No Crime)",

      is.na(initial_rank) | is.na(crime_rank) ~ "Unclassified",

      initial_rank == crime_rank ~ "Severity Match",
      initial_rank > crime_rank ~ "Severity Downgraded",
      initial_rank < crime_rank ~ "Severity Upgraded"
    )
  )
table(combined_data$severity_shift)
```

```{r}
combined_data |> 
  filter(is.na(initial_rank)) |> 
  count(initial_type_clean, sort = TRUE)
```



# Create the final table 
```{r}
district_month_summary <- combined_data |>
  group_by(police_district_number, year_month) |>
  summarise(
    total_calls = n(),

    no_report_count = sum(severity_shift == "N/A (No Crime)"),
    no_report_rate = (no_report_count / total_calls) * 100,

    mismatch_count = sum(severity_shift != "Severity Match" & severity_shift != "N/A (No Crime)"),
    mismatch_rate = if_else(
      (total_calls - no_report_count) > 0,
      (mismatch_count / (total_calls - no_report_count)) * 100,
      NA_real_
    ),

    downgrade_count = sum(severity_shift == "Severity Downgraded"),
    downgrade_rate = if_else(
      (total_calls - no_report_count) > 0,
      (downgrade_count / (total_calls - no_report_count)) * 100,
      NA_real_
    ),

    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
head(district_month_summary)
```

```{r}
district_month_summary <- district_month_summary |>
  mutate(police_district_number = as.character(police_district_number))

# Create Citation Summary
citation_summary <- citation |>
  group_by(district, year_month) |>
  summarise(total_citations = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(district = as.character(district))

# Create Bias Summary
bias_summary <- bias |>
  group_by(district, year_month) |>
  summarise(total_bias = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(district = as.character(district))
```

```{r}
final_table <- district_month_summary |>
  left_join(citation_summary, by = c("police_district_number" = "district", "year_month")) |>
  left_join(bias_summary, by = c("police_district_number" = "district", "year_month")) 
```

```{r}
final_table <- final_table |>
  mutate(
    citations_per_100_calls = (total_citations / total_calls) * 100,
    bias_per_100_calls = (total_bias / total_calls) * 100
  )
```

```{r}
dim(final_table)
sum(is.na(final_table)) 
```


```{r}
head(final_table)
#write_csv(final_table, "final_table.csv")
```

```{r}
ggplot(combined_data, aes(x = severity_shift, fill = severity_shift)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Severity Classification",
    x = "Severity Outcome",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
ggplot(final_table, aes(x = police_district_number, y = no_report_rate)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Perception Gap Distribution by District",
    x = "District",
    y = "No Report Rate (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(final_table, aes(x = year_month, y = no_report_rate, color = police_district_number)) +
  geom_line()
```
```{r}
ggplot(final_table, aes(x = downgrade_rate, y = mismatch_rate)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(
    title = "Downgrade vs Mismatch Relationship",
    x = "Downgrade Rate",
    y = "Mismatch Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(final_table, aes(x = total_calls, y = no_report_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(
    title = "Call Volume vs Perception Gap",
    x = "Total Calls",
    y = "No Report Rate (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
ggplot(combined_data, aes(x = police_district_number, fill = severity_shift)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(
    title = "Severity Distribution by District",
    x = "District",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Severity Outcome"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
